hero.label: Made for Popl
hero.headline: I want to scale Popl's in-person GTM motion across the field.
hero.subheadline: Popl is solving a real problem I saw firsthand at NextAfter: companies spend millions on events but capture almost nothing. Your AI-native badge scanning and CRM sync changes that game. I'm ready to be on the front lines proving it works.

whyCompany.title: You're building the operating system for event revenue
whyCompany.body: Most companies treat events as one-off networking. Popl turns them into a scalable, measurable GTM channel with AI enrichment and real-time CRM sync. At NextAfter, I watched B2B fundraisers struggle to capture and nurture event leads. Your product solves that exact friction point at scale.

whyCompany.title: Y Combinator momentum at the right market moment
whyCompany.body: Post-pandemic, events are back and companies are desperate for lead capture solutions that actually work. You're hiring FMRs now because you've proven product-market fit and you're scaling. This is the inflection point where early team members become the culture.

whyCompany.title: My BDR and marketing experience maps directly to this role
whyCompany.body: I spent 14 months at Copygen doing cold outreach, building sequences, and closing pipeline with HubSpot. Then I shifted to digital marketing strategy at NextAfter where I learned how real GTM teams think about lead quality and nurture. As FMR, I'll bring both the outbound hustle and the marketing mindset to turn event interactions into real deals.

quote: I'm looking for a role where I can move fast, talk to real prospects, and directly impact revenue. Popl checks every box because you're not just selling software, you're building the infrastructure for how B2B teams win at events.
